definition:
1. male , Lat. mas, (Iliad by Homer), etc.; ἄρρην, ὁ, or ἄρρεν, the male , (Aeschulus Tragicus); οἱ ἄρσενες the male sex , (Thucydides) 
2. masculine, strong , (Euripides): metaphorically mighty , κτύπος ἄρσην πόντου (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. of the gender of nouns, masculine , ὀνόματα (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
